name: accounting firms processing 5–15 clients/month tool
description: For accounting firms processing 5–15 clients/month, manual report generation causes compliance issues. We automate report generation and email distribution instead of manual report generation and email distribution.
problem_solved: Timely generation of tax withholding reports for multiple clients.
